info.title: GP Access Control Plane Core API
info.description: First-level future API contract for the headless runtime and штатный Web UI. This contract is a research artifact: it defines target namespaces and payload shape before the service split is implemented.

servers.description: Current compatibility mode and future штатный Web UI entrypoint

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Reserved namespace. The auth model is deferred to a separate architecture decision.

tags.name: Core Strategy Discovery
tags.description: Start, stop, progress, logs and preflight for strategy discovery.

tags.name: Core Presets
tags.description: Domain lists and v2fly-assisted domain selection.

tags.name: Core Backups
tags.description: Backup, upload, download and restore of internal GP data.

tags.name: Core Runs
tags.description: Full run history, run logs and strategy candidates.

tags.name: Core Settings
tags.description: Settings that affect real strategy discovery runs.

tags.name: Service Status
tags.description: Installed GP service state and normalized service diagnostics.

tags.name: Service Releases
tags.description: Release channel, available releases and installation actions.

tags.name: Service V2fly
tags.description: Local v2fly storage status and update actions.

tags.name: Web Slices
tags.description: Штатный Web UI optimized list slices, pagination and screen-specific views.

get.description: Answers what the GP product core is doing now: current discovery run, core jobs and product runtime state.

post.description: Routes a discovery request by mode. The request contains final concrete domains and settings, not a preset id or live preset link.

post.summary: Stop the current strategy discovery run

200.description: Current run progress or idle state

get.summary: Get latest log tail for the current run

get.description: Checks GP/zapret/v2fly prerequisites needed to start discovery. It reports product readiness, not OS monitoring metrics.
Returns only real stored lists: required first, desired second, then user lists in storage order.

post.description: Saves one required, desired or user domain list. The list contents replace the previous contents of that list.
Deletes a user-created list. Required and desired lists cannot be deleted by this method.

get.description: Returns categories from prepared local v2fly storage. If storage is not ready, returns a structured error.

get.summary: Get domains from one v2fly category

post.description: Restores a selected snapshot after UI/client confirmation. There is no separate restore-preview endpoint in the target contract.
Accepts a ZIP backup, validates structure, checksum and compatibility, then imports it into backup storage.

get.description: Returns product run history without UI pagination. UI slices belong to /api/web/...

get.summary: Get latest log tail for a run

get.description: Returns normalized product candidate data. UI grouping and pagination belong to /api/web/...
Answers whether the installed GP service and its data/install state are alive.
Returns normalized GP facts only. OS CPU/RAM/load metrics and UI cards are intentionally out of scope.

post.description: Starts installation if allowed. If blocked, returns a structured reason without starting root-helper.

get.summary: Get a paginated run history page for штатный Web UI
Get a paginated strategy candidates page for штатный Web UI
Get a штатный Web UI event slice

GpToken.description: Reserved for the future auth model. Token lifetime and login flow are intentionally not defined in this research contract.
